creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Luiz: sorry for the duplicate (just that GNATS and the others has it):

can you try this patch on stable/7 or 7.2-R and report back?

Bjoern A. Zeeb                      The greatest risk is not taking one.
